name: 240 Watt LED Shoebox Light | 36720 Lumens | 5700K
description: 240 Watt LED shoebox light – parking lot light has durable die-cast aluminum housing and stainless steel hardware. The standard optic is Type 3 – perfect for parking lots. The fixture comes in a dark bronze finish. There is also a photocell you can order if you want dusk-to-dawn operation.
short_desc: Key Features Wattage: 240 Lumens: 36720 Lumens Per Watt: 153 Replaces: 1000 Watt Metal Halide Voltage: 277V-480V Color Temperature: 5700K CRI: 70+ Dimming: No Beam Angles: Type 3 Optics: Polycarbonate Lens Lifespan: 100,000 (L70) hours Mounting: Arm or Slip Fitter or Trunnion EPA Rating: 1.7 Fixture Color: Bronze Frequency: 50-60Hz Power Factor: > .90 THD: < 15% Durable Construction Housing: Die-Cast Aluminum IP Rating: IP65 Operating Temperature: -40°F to +113°F Certifications: UL | Rebate Eligible Warranty: 5 years Measurements Dimensions: 27 in L X 13.11 in W X 6.61 in H Weight: 17 lbs Features/Accessories Photocell Dimming: 1-10V
